name: Division 726
description_short: Division 726 Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Staten Island transportation workers since 1970, offering personal loans, auto loans, and Christmas loans.
description_long:
Division 726 Federal Credit Union was established in 1970 and has been serving the financial needs of Staten Island, New York for over 50 years. The credit union is specifically focused on serving transportation workers in the Staten Island community and operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit institution regulated by the NCUA. Their physical location at 4886 Arthur Kill Road provides in-person service during limited business hours.

The credit union offers a range of lending products including personal loans (both short-term and long-term options up to 48 months), new and used auto loans with terms up to 72 months, and seasonal Christmas loans. Personal loans start at 8.50% APR for short-term (12-month) options and 8.95% APR for long-term (up to 48 months). Auto lending is competitive, with new car loans starting at 3.95% APR and used car loans at 4.95% APR. Christmas loans are offered seasonally (November through February) at 9.95% APR.

Division 726 differentiates itself through its niche focus on Staten Island transportation workers, creating a tight-knit member community. The credit union maintains a personal approach with a small leadership team visible on their website and direct phone accessibility. As a federal credit union, members benefit from NCUA insurance protection on deposits and member-owned governance structure rather than shareholder profit maximization.

The primary limitation is accessibility—the credit union operates only Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday from 9:30 AM to 3:00 PM, plus Friday 9:30 AM to 12 noon, which may be restrictive for working individuals. There is no mention of online lending, mobile apps, or extended digital services beyond account login functionality. The website appears minimally maintained (WordPress template with dated design), and no information is provided about membership eligibility requirements, deposit products, or other services beyond lending.
services: New car loans (starting 3.95% APR, up to 72 months)
Used car loans and lease buyouts (starting 4.95% APR, up to 60 months)
Long-term personal loans (starting 8.95% APR, up to 48 months)
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 3.95% APR for new cars and 4.95% for used cars
NCUA insurance protection on member deposits and accounts
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure prioritizes member benefit over profit extraction
Dedicated focus on Staten Island transportation workers creates community accountability
Long-term personal loan terms available up to 48 months with reasonable 8.95% starting APR
Direct phone access (718-356-1616) and in-person service with identifiable leadership team
Established 50+ year history serving local community since 1970
cons: Very limited operating hours (closed Wednesday, Friday closes at noon, no Saturday/Sunday service)
No evidence of online banking, digital lending applications, or mobile services
Appears to serve only Staten Island transportation workers—membership eligibility unclear for general public
Website is minimally maintained and lacks information on deposit products, membership requirements, and full service offerings
Single physical location may create accessibility challenges for members outside immediate area
best_for: Staten Island transportation workers seeking relationship banking with a community-focused credit union
Auto buyers looking for competitive rates from a local, member-owned lender
Individuals preferring member-owned financial institutions over for-profit banks
diagnosis: Division 726 is best for Staten Island transportation workers and local residents seeking personalized, community-focused credit union lending with competitive auto and personal loan rates. The primary caveat is severely limited operating hours (closed Wednesdays, Friday closes at noon) and apparent lack of digital banking services, making this credit union impractical for customers who need after-hours access or online lending capabilities.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Division 726 — NCUA-insured credit union in STATEN ISLAND, NY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
